creative_brief: Close-up hero shot of richly marbled, deep-red grass-fed beef on butcher paper, slightly unwrapped, with visible moisture and texture. Warm, natural lighting. No packaging, no plastic. Small text overlay: 'Days old, not weeks.'
primary_text:
Have you ever opened a pack of beef and wondered why it smells like the bag, not the meat?

That's what weeks in cold storage does. Supermarket beef travels 2,400km and sits 14 to 21 days before it reaches you.

Our 100% grass-fed beef comes from Rachel's Farm in Kempsey, NSW. Pasture raised, no hormones, no feedlots. Days old when you collect it from our Brookvale hub.

You can smell the difference before you even cook it.

No commitment. Order when you want. Collect Monday to Friday.
headline: Beef that smells like beef again
description: Days old, not weeks. 100% grass-fed from named NSW farms to the Brookvale hub.
